hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -q 'registry\.json' && (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && pnpm -s build:registry) 2>/dev/null || true

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]) *git +commit' || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; if pnpm -s check && pnpm -s test; then exit 0; else echo 'Commit blocked: pnpm check or test failed. Fix, then retry the commit.' >&2; exit 2; fi
